DropNotes iOS App

For a class project, I worked with a team of 5 others to develop a functioning iOS application. At the end of the project, we had a working application that could be loaded onto an iOS device and used, and it turned out rather well.

The final product was admittedly buggy, but the point of the project wasn't to make a perfect, app-store-ready product, but rather to simulate the production cycle of a software product from design to release. It was challenging but informative having to deal with version control, scheduling, and conflicting ideas/understandings for the first time.

Website designed and developed by Alan Robison
